on tenex-edge tmux, when I create a new session it creates the session within the pwd I'm in instead of within the selected project's dir!

Identified the bug: the tmux TUI spawn handler resolved the project from the TUI process's cwd instead of the selected project tab. Fixed it to use the active tab's project filter, falling back to cwd only on the "all projects" tab.
The fix is committed and in HEAD, though it rode along inside a concurrent agent's commit (8da7494e) rather than getting its own dedicated commit. The tree builds clean and the fix is live.
